_comment: Ground truth for the Volatility Cridex banking-trojan memory image.
Source: canonical download (downloads.volatilityfoundation.org) is currently DEAD;
repo read-only since May 2025; no published authoritative hash. Awaiting a verified
mirror (a SANS-hosted copy with hashes was requested in the thread).
Tier: RED for SOURCING (do not rely until hosted), but the IOCs are canonical and
well documented. memory-class case. Classic signal: reader_sl.exe spawned by
explorer.exe with injected code and outbound C2.

findings.description: Malicious process reader_sl.exe running, spawned by explorer.exe
findings.artifact_hint: vol pslist/pstree: reader_sl.exe child of explorer.exe

findings.description: Code injection / hollowed RWX region detected in a host process
findings.artifact_hint: vol malfind: injected region in explorer.exe / reader_sl.exe

findings.description: Outbound C2 network connections from the infected host
Anomalous parent-child relationship consistent with trojan injection
Persistence mechanism registered by the trojan
findings.artifact_hint: Registry Run key recovered from memory hives
